summary: BLOCK 432 (Smart Track Selection) - Full testing completed. All 12 features verified: (1) Now Spinning modal opens correctly, (2) Collection search for 'Speak' finds 'Speak Now', (3) Selecting record with discogs_id shows track dropdown, (4) Dropdown shows 'Select a track (optional)' placeholder with music icon, (5) Track dropdown displays 14 tracks with positions (A1-D3), titles, and durations, (6) Search input filters tracks by position or title, (7) Selecting track shows 'A1 — Mine' in trigger, (8) Clear button (X) clears selection, (9) Records without discogs_id show text input fallback, (10) Deselecting record resets track state, (11) Dropdown closes when clicking outside, (12) Full post submission works with selected track.
critical_code_review_comments: ComposerBar.js lines 43-55: State variables (spinTracks, spinTracksLoading, spinTrackDropdownOpen, spinTrackSearch) properly initialized for track selection
ComposerBar.js lines 149-182: selectSpinRecord correctly fetches tracklist via /api/discogs/release/{discogs_id} when record has discogs_id, sets spinTracks array
ComposerBar.js lines 119-131: useEffect properly handles click outside to close dropdown with trackDropdownRef
ComposerBar.js lines 430-549: Track selector JSX well-implemented with loading state, searchable dropdown, text input fallback, clear button, and proper data-testid attributes
database.py lines 252-304: get_discogs_release correctly returns tracklist with position, title, duration from Discogs API
collection.py lines 31-36: /api/discogs/release/{release_id} endpoint properly secured with require_auth and returns release data
seed_data_creation: N/A - used existing test user with Speak Now (discogs_id=2555127) and Test records without discogs_id
context_for_next_testing_agent: BLOCK 432 (Smart Track Selection) verified. Test user (test@example.com) has 4 records: 'Speak Now' by Taylor Swift (discogs_id=2555127, 14 tracks), and 3 test records without discogs_id for fallback testing. The track dropdown uses data-testid values: spin-track-dropdown-trigger, spin-track-clear, spin-track-search-input, spin-track-option-{idx}, spin-track-input (fallback). Discogs API integration is REAL (not mocked) - streaming links are mocked.

collection_search_works.details: Searching 'Speak' finds 'Speak Now' by Taylor Swift correctly

track_dropdown_appears_for_discogs_recor.details: After selecting record with discogs_id, track text input replaced with searchable dropdown

track_dropdown_placeholder.details: Dropdown shows 'Select a track (optional)' placeholder with music icon

track_dropdown_shows_tracks.details: Dropdown displays 14 tracks with positions (A1-D3), titles, and durations (e.g., 'A1 Mine 3:51')

track_selection_shows_value.details: Selecting A1 shows 'A1 — Mine' in trigger

track_clear_button_works.details: X button clears selection, returns to placeholder 'Select a track (optional)'

fallback_text_input_for_no_discogs.details: Records without discogs_id (Test, Test Album 1, TEST_WebSocket_Album) show text input with placeholder 'Track (optional)'

deselect_record_resets_state.details: Clicking X on selected record deselects and shows search input again

full_post_submission_with_track.details: Post submitted successfully with selected track 'A1 — Mine', modal closed, toast shown 'now spinning posted.'

mocked_api_note: Streaming links (Spotify/Apple Music) are MOCKED. Discogs API integration for tracklist is REAL.
